# Command and path completion implementation (2026-03-13 10:28Z)

_**User**_

Implement Task 3 and Task 4 from docs/plans/2026-03-13-tab-completion-impl-plan.md.

**Task 3: 命令补全**
- In src/completion.rs add BUILTIN_COMMANDS constant (pwd, cd, ls, mkdir, cat, touch, echo, save, export-readonly, export_readonly, exit, quit, help).
- Add pub fn complete_commands(prefix: &str) -> Vec<String>: filter BUILTIN_COMMANDS by prefix (case-insensitive), return matching command names.
- In tests/completion_tests.rs add: complete_commands("he") contains "help"; complete_commands("") returns all commands.

**Task 4: 路径补全**
- In src/completion.rs add pub fn complete_path(prefix: &str, parent_names: &[String]) -> Vec<String>: take last segment of prefix (after last /), filter parent_names by starts_with that segment, return matches. If prefix is empty, return all parent_names.
- Add test: complete_path("fo", &["foo".into(), "foobar".into(), "bar".into()]) returns ["foo", "foobar"].

Run: cargo test completion_tests
Commit: git add src/completion.rs tests/completion_tests.rs && git commit -m "feat(completion): command and path completion candidates"

Work directory: /home/ars/richard/2026/pvm_2/dev_shell
Report: what was added, test result, commit.
